description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, double-sided metal head featuring octagonal striking faces and reinforced with riveted bands around the center. The head is adorned with intricate, engraved patterns on the central band, giving it a decorative yet industrial appearance. The metal surface is weathered, showing a mottled, dark gray finish with visible scuffs and wear, suggesting frequent use. The handle is cylindrical, made of metal, and features a ribbed grip section at the base for improved handling and control. The overall construction is solid and utilitarian, designed for delivering powerful blows in demanding urban or industrial environments. The hammer exudes a sense of durability and strength, suitable for demolition or heavy construction tasks.
description: A large, weathered sledgehammer with a double-sided, octagonal metal head and a ribbed metal handle, featuring decorative engravings and visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the double-sided, octagonal metal head with decorative engravings and riveted bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat, square striking face and the thickness of the hammer head, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite octagonal face and central engravings, with similar weathering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the flat, square striking face and the handle's alignment, matching view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with a ribbed grip section at the base for enhanced control.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledgehammer head with octagonal striking faces, reinforced with riveted bands and decorative engravings.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffs, scratches, and surface wear on the metal head, indicating frequent use.
